---
title: "symlog"
generated: true
description: "Matrix logarithm of an SPD batch."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.linalg.spd`](../nitrix-linalg-spd.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:symlog -->
```python
symlog(input: Float[Array, '... d d'], *, psi: float = 0.0, key: Optional[jax.Array] = None, eigvalue_clip: EigvalueClip = 'auto') -> Float[Array, '... d d']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:symlog -->
Matrix logarithm of an SPD batch.

Applies $\log$ to the eigenvalues via [`symmap`](../nitrix-linalg-spd/symmap.qmd).  With
`eigvalue_clip='auto'` (default), eigenvalues below the rank-truncation
threshold are floored to that threshold before the logarithm, producing a
finite negative entry rather than $-\infty$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:symlog -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `input` | `Float` | `...` √ó `d` √ó `d` | ‚Äî | Symmetric (assumed SPD) matrix batch. |
| `psi` | `float` | ‚Äî | `0.0` | Reconditioning strength forwarded to [`symmap`](../nitrix-linalg-spd/symmap.qmd). |
| `key` | `Optional[jax.Array]` | ‚Äî | `None` | PRNG key, required when `psi > 0`. |
| `eigvalue_clip` | `EigvalueClip` | ‚Äî | `'auto'` | Eigenvalue clipping policy forwarded to [`symmap`](../nitrix-linalg-spd/symmap.qmd). |

**Returns** `Float` ‚Äî shape `...` √ó `d` √ó `d`. The matrix logarithm of each input matrix; same shape as `input`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:symlog -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks ‚Äî nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **1.96 ms** (median, L4); up to **132.39√ó faster** than `scipy.linalg.logm`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_SYMLOG.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| symlog | jax-cpu | d=256 | `cupy.eigh_logm` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| symlog | jax-cpu | d=256 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 5.05 ms / 5.43 ms | 328.68 ms | 522 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00048√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| symlog | jax-cpu | d=256 | `scipy.linalg.logm` | ok | 250.83 ms / 358.58 ms | 520.65 ms | 473 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0012√ótol | 49.65x vs nitrix-jax |
| symlog | jax-cuda12 | d=256 | `cupy.eigh_logm` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| symlog | jax-cuda12 | d=256 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 1.95 ms / 1.96 ms | 1.214 s | 72.09 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00064√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| symlog | jax-cuda12 | d=256 | `scipy.linalg.logm` | ok | 170.22 ms / 298.03 ms | 1.602 s | 0.26 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0012√ótol | 87.32x vs nitrix-jax |
| symlog | jax-cpu | d=512 | `cupy.eigh_logm` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| symlog | jax-cpu | d=512 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 25.64 ms / 30.55 ms | 2.215 s | 550 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00057√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| symlog | jax-cpu | d=512 | `scipy.linalg.logm` | ok | 676.01 ms / 2.582 s | 1.373 s | 500 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0014√ótol | 26.37x vs nitrix-jax |
| symlog | jax-cuda12 | d=512 | `cupy.eigh_logm` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| symlog | jax-cuda12 | d=512 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 4.29 ms / 4.31 ms | 1.208 s | 74.45 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00042√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| symlog | jax-cuda12 | d=512 | `scipy.linalg.logm` | ok | 567.46 ms / 1.086 s | 4.004 s | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0014√ótol | 132.39x vs nitrix-jax |
| symlog | jax-cpu | d=64 | `cupy.eigh_logm` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| symlog | jax-cpu | d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 387.4 ¬µs / 397.0 ¬µs | 172.98 ms | 516 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00044√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| symlog | jax-cpu | d=64 | `scipy.linalg.logm` | ok | 4.64 ms / 5.00 ms | 174.22 ms | 471 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00086√ótol | 11.97x vs nitrix-jax |
| symlog | jax-cuda12 | d=64 | `cupy.eigh_logm` | ok | 705.9 ¬µs / 709.9 ¬µs | 1.118 s | 0.02 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00048√ótol | 0.95x vs nitrix-jax |
| symlog | jax-cuda12 | d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 746.3 ¬µs / 751.7 ¬µs | 952.87 ms | 71.35 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00048√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| symlog | jax-cuda12 | d=64 | `scipy.linalg.logm` | ok | 64.42 ms / 110.01 ms | 260.89 ms | 0.02 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00086√ótol | 86.31x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `daec36e9` ¬∑ nitrix `fcbe94d3`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:symlog -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
